description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build / Test that runs on push to all branches except those starting with pre. and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a matrix job that runs on ubuntu-20.04, macos-latest, and windows-latest, with write-all permissions. In each job, check out the repository with submodules, set up Python 3.10, install Conan 1.59.0, configure CMake with Release build type, build the project in parallel, and run tests with CTest.
